pageDesc: Let your AI assistant silently execute recurring tasks on schedule
emptyDesc: Create a task, e.g. "Summarize yesterday's workspace changes every morning at 9 AM"
descriptionPlaceholder: Optional: briefly describe the purpose of this task
executionModeTip: New conversation mode starts the task with a clean slate each time. Resume mode appends to the last conversation to maintain persistent context and memory continuity.
promptPlaceholder: Enter the full instruction to send to the AI assistant when triggered...
presetManualDesc: Only runs when you click Run Now
presetHourlyDesc: Triggers at the top of every hour
presetDailyDesc: Runs once per day at your specified time
presetWeekdaysDesc: Runs Mon–Fri at your specified time
presetWeeklyDesc: Runs once a week on a chosen day
cronExprTip:
Standard 5-field format: min(0-59) hr(0-23) day(1-31) mon(1-12) weekday(0-6, 0=Sun)
Examples: */30 * * * * = every 30 min, 0 9 * * 1-5 = weekdays at 9 AM
enabledMsg: The scheduler will now run this task automatically
deleteConfirm: Delete this scheduled task? This cannot be undone.
triggeredMsg: Task started in background. Check the sidebar for progress.
